summary: Code review and UI testing of Protein Planner v2. External n8n webhook API returning empty responses (HTTP 200 with content-length: 0), preventing full E2E testing. Conducted thorough code review for all 6 reported bugs.

minor.issue: External n8n webhook API returns HTTP 200 with empty body (content-length: 0), causing meal planning screen to be blank

ui_bugs.issue: P1 BUG: Budget badge will show 'Distribution confirmed' fallback instead of protein values. The component expects 'fullData' prop but it's NOT passed at line 789
P1 BUG: Product selection allows multiple products per category. Line 579 just toggles selection without SWAP logic to enforce max 1 per source category
P2 BUG: 'Select These' button stays enabled after clicking because 'selected' state is not cleared after onSelect is called
P2 BUG: Floating-point values not rounded. Line 638 shows raw 'total' value, line 645 shows 'p.protein_g' without rounding - could show values like 29.2999999

integration_issues.issue: n8n webhook API returns empty responses, blocking entire meal planning flow testing

action_items: P1 FIX: Pass 'fullData' prop to CollapsedBadge at line 789 - e.g., fullData={m.data || {}}
P1 FIX: Implement SWAP logic in ProductCardGrid - when selecting a product, if another product from same category is selected, replace it instead of adding
P2 FIX: Clear 'selected' state after onSelect is called in ProductCardGrid, or disable button while submission is in progress
P2 FIX: Add rounding to protein displays at lines 638 and 645 - use Math.round(value * 10) / 10 or toFixed(1)
critical_code_review_comments: Line 789: <CollapsedBadge key={i} type={m.data.ui_type} data={m.data.ui_data || {}} /> - Missing 'fullData' prop that component expects
Line 579: Product selection does not enforce max 1 per category swap - onClick just toggles without checking category
Line 638: total + '/' + data.protein_target + 'g' - total needs rounding with toFixed(1)
Line 645: {p.protein_g}g - needs rounding to avoid floating point display issues
Line 613: Button disabled condition only checks selected.length === 0, needs state management for post-submission

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully test - API dependency

context_for_next_testing_agent: External n8n webhook (https://karanbabbar.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/v2/meal-planning) returns empty responses. P0 bug (msg.trim) appears fixed in code. Other bugs verified through code review. To fully test, either mock the API or wait for n8n webhook to be functional.

rca_of_issue.P0_msg_trim: Fixed - Line 732 adds type checking before trim()
rca_of_issue.P1_budget_badge: Not Fixed - CollapsedBadge expects fullData prop but it's not passed at line 789. The fix in component (lines 366-369) won't work without this data.
rca_of_issue.P1_product_max_1: Not Fixed - No category-based swap logic implemented. Line 579 onClick handler just adds/removes without checking existing selections in same category.
rca_of_issue.P2_button_stays_active: Not Fixed - selected state persists after onSelect callback
rca_of_issue.P2_floating_point: Partially Fixed - Only line 655 uses toFixed(1), lines 638 and 645 display raw floating point values
